title: Thomson's Falls
description: 74-metre cascade on the Ewaso Narok River — a classic budget stop in Nyahururu with viewpoint walks and local snacks.
highlights:
74 m drop
Viewpoint walk
Nyahururu stopover
Low entry cost
directions: Bus/matatu to Nyahururu town, short boda or walk to falls gate.
public_transport: Bus Nairobi–Nyahururu KES 500–700. Local boda KES 100.
road_conditions: Tarmac to town; paved path to viewpoint.
safety_and_conditions: Slippery rocks near spray zone — stay behind rails.
what_to_carry: Rain jacket, camera, cash for entry.
travel_tips: Visit early morning for photos without crowds.

title: Karura Waterfall
description: Short forest trail to a waterfall inside Karura — cheapest waterfall fix minutes from Nairobi.
highlights:
Urban waterfall
Forest shade
Low entry fee
Family friendly
directions: Enter via Sigiria or Limuru Road gate; follow signs to waterfall loop.
safety_and_conditions: Muddy near falls after rain; supervise children on steps.
travel_tips: Combine with caves loop on same ticket.

title: Zaina Falls
description: Multi-tier cascade in the Aberdare foothills reached by a moderate forest hike from Nyeri side.
highlights:
Forest hike
Tiered falls
Cool climate
Guide recommended
directions: Bus to Nyeri, arrange taxi to trailhead near Aberdare forest edge.
road_conditions: Murram forest roads; trail muddy in rains.
safety_and_conditions: Slippery rocks; use guide in wet season.
what_to_carry: Rain gear, grippy shoes, insect repellent.
travel_tips: Go after rains for best flow.

title: Karuru Falls
description: Three-step waterfall deep in the Aberdares — one of Kenya's tallest falls, accessed on a budget day trip with KWS guide.
highlights:
Three-tier falls
Aberdare forest
KWS guide required
Scenic drive
map_query: Karuru Falls Aberdare National Park Kenya
directions: Enter via Nyeri or Naivasha park gates; 4x4 or KWS vehicle to falls viewpoint trail.
public_transport: Bus to Nyeri; park transport shared KES 2,000+.
safety_and_conditions: Cold, misty conditions; stay on marked viewpoint.
travel_tips: Book KWS guide at gate; no self-drive to falls viewpoint.

title: Fourteen Falls
description: Wide cascade on the Athi River near Thika — easy access and boat views on a budget day trip from Nairobi.
highlights:
Wide river falls
Boat option
Picnic spot
Close to Nairobi
directions: Matatu to Thika, then boda/taxi to falls and boat landing.
safety_and_conditions: Strong currents — avoid swimming. Boat operators vary in safety — wear life jacket.
travel_tips: Negotiate boat price before boarding; KES 500–800 pp typical.
nearby_attractions: Thika town, Ol Donyo Sabuk nearby

title: Chania Falls
description: Hidden cascade in the Chania River gorge near Thika — short walk and local guide tips only.
highlights:
Gorge waterfall
Short walk
Low cost
Picnic friendly
directions: Matatu to Thika, local boda to Chania river access point.
safety_and_conditions: Flash flood risk in heavy rain — avoid gorge in storms.

title: Sheldrick Falls
description: Rainforest waterfall in Shimba Hills — combine with budget coastal hike and elephant spotting.
highlights:
Coastal rainforest
Shimba Hills hike
Swim pool below falls
Elephant links
directions: Bus/matatu Mombasa–Kwale–Shimba gate, or SGR to Mombasa then bus south.
public_transport: SGR Mombasa KES 1,000+; bus to gate KES 300–500.
road_conditions: Murram in park; 2 km forest trail to falls.
safety_and_conditions: Elephants in park — keep distance. Leeches in wet season.
travel_tips: Budget night in Kwale town before early park entry.

title: Ragia Forest Cascade
description: Bamboo-lined waterfall in the Aberdare forest belt — quiet alternative to crowded Nairobi day trips.
highlights:
Bamboo forest
Low crowds
Community forest
Short hike
directions: Matatu towards Lari/Kijabe, connect boda to Ragia forest station.
safety_and_conditions: Go with forest guide; remote phone signal.

title: Magura Falls
description: Forest waterfall in western Kenya near Keroka — offbeat stop on a Kisii–Narok budget route.
highlights:
Western Kenya gem
Forest walk
Low tourist traffic
Community access
directions: Bus to Keroka, boda to Magura forest trail.
what_to_carry: Rain gear, cash for guide tip.
travel_tips: Ask at Keroka market for latest trail conditions.

title: Gura Falls Viewpoint
description: Dramatic Aberdare gorge falls — viewpoint access on a ranger-led budget walk from the Nyeri side.
highlights:
Deep gorge views
Aberdare ecosystem
Ranger walks
Cool climate
directions: Similar access to Aberdare park gates; ranger escort to gorge viewpoint.
public_transport: Bus to Nyeri; park fees and guide at gate.
road_conditions: Park roads variable; walking trail moderate.
travel_tips: Pair with Zaina or Karuru same trip if multi-day.
